Diabetes email
Doctors consider you diabetic if your Hemoglobin A1C is over 6.4.
Tom Shrows was an 8.4.
He was on 4 different kinds of medication...
Suffered from acid reflux, gouty arthritis, obstructive sleep apnea, allergies, carpal
tunnel...
And he weighed 309lbs.
Tom knew something needed to change.
But according to his doctor, his diabetes wasn’t something he could fix.
It was something he’d have to live with. And do his best to "manage it" over time.
That killed Tom.
Because Tom hated what diabetes had done to his life.
That he had to constantly turn down food every time he’d go to a party.
That he would constantly feel tired, heavy and bloated.
That every person around him would try to give him advice on HIS disease.
Telling him he just needed to “stop eating sugar” and “get some more exercise so he
could lose that weight!”
It drove him nuts!
Which was why even though his doctor told him it was a waste of time...
He didn’t stop looking for something that would help him.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 14 --

Eventually...
Tom stumbled on something called “the Primal diet” (aka, paleo)...
Where you only eat the things humans could have had thousands of years ago.
Tom didn’t expect a whole lot.
But once he changed his eating...
It was like a switch had been flipped.
He says...
“Type II Diabetes was gone within a month. After 4 months my A1C is now at 5.1.
I also eliminated acid reflux, gouty arthritis, obstructive sleep apnea, seasonal allergies,
plantar fasciitis, carpal tunnel, nerve cluster on knee, skin tags, and mood issues.
I used to get sick three to four times per year, But I have not been sick since going Primal.
And I’m down to zero prescription medications too.”
Can you believe that?
His health completely FLIPPED.
JUST by changing the way he ate.
And it just goes to show that no matter how bad it gets...
It’s never too late to turn around your health.
Once you figure out the foods that works for YOU, everything can change.
Just something to inspire you today.
And if you suffer from diabetes like Tom did...
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

World War II Vet
Was On His Death-Bed
...Then THIS Happened
"He's turning into a shell of his former self" his wife cried.
Len had become so frail that it
took every ounce of energy
just to hoist himself out of his
scooter and into his favorite
Lazy Boy.
But Len hadn't always been
this way...
In fact, when he was serving
our country during World War
II, he was a strapping 225 lb.
guy!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 14 --

But now, he was so weak that his wife was forced to wait on
him around-the-clock at the Veterans home.
After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Len's wife
had finally had enough...
In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies
to see if there was something out there that would give her
husband his vitality back...
After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon
a homemade "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising.
After reading about the drink, Len's wife started whipping up a 6
oz glass of it each morning for her husband.
"What could it hurt?" she thought...
She didn't expect much at first...
But just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was
seeing...
She arrived at Len's room one morning and much to her
surprise, Len was already up and trekking his way across the
Veterans home to get some blood work done!
But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to
make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 14 --

Now that might not seem like much to you, but previously Len
was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his
bed.
Getting out of his room wasn't even an option.
Len's wife couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing!
"I am watching my 87-year-old husband come back to life!

better. I figured the drink couldn't hurt, but I didn't expect

Now, Len's results were amazing, and I can't guarantee that
everyone will get results like his...
But if this drink did all of this for a frail, 87-year-old like Len,

So what is this drink that's helping Len and thousands of other

Iowa Plumber Stunned When
Mysterious "Jungle Punch"
Relieves His Bad Knee
.
After 41 years of crawling around and fixing broken toilets,
Tony's knees were in agony...
"By lunch my knee would flare up
and my ankles would be swollen"
he said. "And nothing seemed to
help...Ben Gay, aspirin, fish
oil...none of it"
But that wasn't even the worst
part...
"I got at least 3 more years before I can even think about
retiring" he said. "So right now I'm just grittin' my teeth and
dealing with the pain"
